Title: Live Bands at The Ext Siargao
Details: Live bands from 9 PM while enjoying beers and cocktails from 6 PM onwards.

Title: Disco Tropico DJ set
Details: Disco Tropico DJ set with Happy Hour BOGO promo from 5:30-7:30PM

Title: Goodies Nightlife Party
Details: Local and international DJs bring the party starting at 9PM.

Details: Mama Coco welcomes you from 6 PM to 12 midnight, featuring happy hour specials from 6 to 8 PM.

Details: Live music, unique acts, and more. The party runs from 9PM to 12 midnight.

Details: Join the festivities from 6PM onwards for delicious food, shopping, refreshing drinks, and fun dancing.

Title: Nightlife at Siargao Beach Club and Sibol
Details: Socializing every night with music and dancing
